itemName.zh: Ars Arma A18 Skanda 插板胸挂（复合迷彩）
itemName.en: Ars Arma A18 Skanda plate carrier (MultiCam)

description.zh: 嘿，作为朋友我得跟你说，在生意里如何表现自己很重要，不要跟个笨蛋或者书呆子似的。如果你学得会，不仅女孩会喜欢你，客户也会喜欢你。这是我的秘诀，欢迎尝试。我跟埃尔维拉有个小生意做，就是那个医院的首席治疗师。但只有你提升了自己的魅力之后我才能相信你，就你现在这鸟样她根本看都不会看你一眼，无意冒犯。
description.en: Hey. I’ll tell you as a friend, that in trade what matters is how you present yourself, not being a dork or a nerd. Then, not only girls but also customers will love you. This is my secret, feel free to use it. I have a little business proposition to Elvira, the chief therapist at the hospital. But I can only trust you with this if you pump up your charisma because right now she won’t even look at you, no offense. We're gonna make a real man out of you.
